The Cocofay Difference

Skincare that actually listens to your skin.

We built Cocofay because we needed it ourselves. Every formula starts with one question: is this gentle enough, and strong enough, to actually work on real skin?

Organically Sourced

Every ingredient is chosen with intention. No fillers, no harsh stripping agents — just what your skin recognises and responds to.

Results, Not Hype

We don’t promise overnight miracles. We promise that with consistent use, you’ll see a real difference — and so will others.

Designed for You

Formulated specifically for melanin-rich skin — which behaves differently, scars differently, and deserves products built for it.

The Cocofay experience

Soft skin is a feeling.

When the right product meets the right skin, you feel it — and everyone around you notices.

Why Cocofay

Not hype. Not trends. Formulas that work for the skin you’re in.

Organic Ingredients

Every ingredient is intentional. No unnecessary additives or fillers.

All Skin Tones

Formulated with melanin-rich skin in mind. Works with your chemistry, not against it.

Premium for Less

Fast & Trusted

Hundreds of orders delivered across Nigeria. Same-day packaging, real support.

The story behind the brand
Founder, Cocofay Organics

Built from personal struggle — not just passion.

Years of trying products that promised results but left the skin worse — irritated, reactive, and dull. The expensive ones. The popular ones. None of them were made for skin like mine.

That frustration became a question: what would I actually want in a skincare brand? Something gentle enough to not cause damage. Effective enough to show real results. And honest enough to not overpromise.

That’s what Cocofay is. Every product passed through personal use before it was ever put in a customer’s hands. This brand exists for the person who’s tired of trying things that don’t work.

“Soft skin isn’t a luxury. It’s the result of using the right things — things your skin was meant to receive.”
Good to know

Frequently asked questions

Yes. Cocofay products are formulated to be gentle enough for sensitive and reactive skin. We avoid harsh actives that strip or irritate. Message us on WhatsApp and we’ll guide you to the right product for your specific concern.

For the Face Oil and Body Oil, most customers feel a noticeable difference within 3–5 days of consistent use. For the Even Tone Repair Cream, expect visible improvement in 3–6 weeks with regular twice-daily application.

Yes. We deliver nationwide across Nigeria. Lagos and Abuja orders typically arrive within 2–3 business days. Message us on WhatsApp with your location for an accurate delivery estimate.

Absolutely. The face oil, body oil, and cleanse are all suitable for men. We also have the Élan Noir fragrance specifically formulated for men, and several male customers use our full skincare line.

Click the “Order on WhatsApp” button anywhere on this page. You’ll be connected directly to us. Tell us what you want and your location, and we’ll confirm your order right there in the chat.

Our fragrances are oil-based, which means they last longer on the skin and are gentler than alcohol-based sprays. Élan Noir and Élan Femme are formulated for long wear without irritating the skin.
